title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General

jsonLd.title: Lead Investment Banker at Bajaj Allianz General
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Bajaj Allianz General in Jaipur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Allianz General:
Bajaj Allianz General is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Allianz General!
